title: Empathy: Unconditional Positive Regard
description: Structured conversion of the legacy unconditional positive regard slides.

sources.label: Carl Rogers, On Becoming a Person

slides.title: Unconditional Positive Regard
slides.body: Non-contingent respect and warmth toward the client as a person.
bullets: Validates subjective experience without endorsing every action.
Counters shame and conditions of worth.
Makes disowned parts safer to contact.

columns.title: What It Is
columns.body: Respect for the client's inherent worth, even when the work includes painful impact, limits, or accountability.

columns.title: What It Does
columns.body: Reduces defensiveness so shame, fear, need, and longing can become workable experience.

columns.title: Practice Move
columns.body: Assume protectiveness first: this makes sense as a way you survived.

slides.title: Common drift
rows: Stay with the part that cannot receive acceptance.
